\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{cgsqr\_()}{cgsqr\_()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{SimJob_8cpp_a5689047dc461187481588ab4352aa2da} 
void cgsqr\+\_\+ (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}} \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{ca}{, }\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}} \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{cy}{, }\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}} \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{cx}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{mxn}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{n}{, }\item[{double \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{err}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{mxiter}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{iter}{, }\item[{float \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{time}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



External conjugate gradient solver (complex version) from cg.\+f. 

Solves a linear system Ax = y iteratively using the conjugate gradient squared (CGS) algorithm for complex-\/valued matrices.


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em ca} & Pointer to the complex system matrix A (flattened). \\
\hline
{\em cy} & Pointer to the complex right-\/hand side vector y. \\
\hline
{\em cx} & Pointer to the complex solution vector x (input guess, then result). \\
\hline
{\em mxn} & Total number of elements in A. \\
\hline
{\em n} & Dimension of the linear system. \\
\hline
{\em err} & Target relative error tolerance. \\
\hline
{\em mxiter} & Maximum number of iterations allowed. \\
\hline
{\em iter} & On exit, the number of iterations performed. \\
\hline
{\em time} & On exit, elapsed time in seconds. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}

\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{CleanUpFiles()}{CleanUpFiles()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{SimJob_8cpp_a4e11941feabcc94ac6a1f50dc8d90394} 
int Clean\+Up\+Files (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{std\+::map$<$ const char \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}, std\+::ofstream \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*} $>$}]{files}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Close and deallocate a set of open output files. 


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em files} & Map of filenames (as C-\/string keys) to open file stream pointers. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
Always returns 0.
\end{DoxyReturn}
Iterates through a map of file streams, closing and deleting each associated {\ttfamily std\+::ofstream} pointer, then clears the container. Each entry\textquotesingle{}s stream is closed and its pointer freed using {\ttfamily delete}. The input map is then cleared to remove all entries.

\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{JacobiPrecondition()}{JacobiPrecondition()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{SimJob_8cpp_a81dafa8ebba533efb547fc5dda890a4b} 
int Jacobi\+Precondition (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{blitz\+::\+Array$<$ \mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}}, 2 $>$ \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{in\+Matrix}{, }\item[{blitz\+::\+Array$<$ \mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}}, 1 $>$ \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{in\+Vector}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Apply Jacobi preconditioning to a complex linear system. 


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em in\+Matrix} & Pointer to the complex system matrix (modified in place). \\
\hline
{\em in\+Vector} & Pointer to the complex right-\/hand side vector (modified in place). \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
Always returns 0.
\end{DoxyReturn}
Scales each row of the input matrix and corresponding vector element by the inverse of the diagonal entry, effectively normalizing the system\textquotesingle{}s diagonal to unity. For each row i, this routine multiplies both the i-\/th vector element and the entire row of {\ttfamily in\+Matrix} by 1 / A(i,i).

Solves a system of linear equations using the LU factorization. 


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em TRANS} & Specifies the form of the system of equations (\textquotesingle{}N\textquotesingle{} for no transpose, etc.). \\
\hline
{\em N} & Order of the coefficient matrix. \\
\hline
{\em NRHS} & Number of right-\/hand sides. \\
\hline
{\em A} & Pointer to the LU-\/factored coefficient matrix. \\
\hline
{\em LDA} & Leading dimension of A. \\
\hline
{\em IPIV} & Pointer to the pivot indices from {\ttfamily zgetrf\+\_\+}. \\
\hline
{\em B} & Pointer to the right-\/hand side vector(s). \\
\hline
{\em LDB} & Leading dimension of B. \\
\hline
{\em INFO} & Output status (0 if successful). \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
